description: Configure two independent Docker Compose projects, 'shared-infra' (PostgreSQL + Redis) and 'flask-api', to communicate via external networks. Create two external Docker networks named 'infra-db-net' and 'infra-cache-net'. Modify the docker-compose.yml files in '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/shared-infra/' and '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/flask-api/' to connect the services: Postgres to 'infra-db-net', Redis to 'infra-cache-net', and the API service to both. Ensure the networks are declared as external. Verify connectivity via the Flask app's health checks (http://localhost:5050/health/db and /health/redis) and save a report confirming the network configuration and connection status to '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/connectivity-report.txt'.
